# Robots.txt for Ansar English School
# Public pages are crawlable; admin and private utility paths should stay out of search results.

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /admin.html
Disallow: /GOOGLE_SHEETS_APPS_SCRIPT.gs
Disallow: /firebase-init.js
Disallow: /*?*

Sitemap: https://ansarschool.in/sitemap.xml
